flags.label: Private nonprofit certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Pennsylvania Institute of Technology are 48% below the private nonprofit certificate-predominant peer median ($35.7k vs $68.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pennsylvania Institute of Technology rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.3k → $16.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pennsylvania Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($9.3k → $10.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Pennsylvania Institute of Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (32.6% vs 41.5%).
